# Anduril Deploys 300th Autonomous Surveillance Tower (AST), Advancing Capability for Border Security

Anduril is proud to announce the deployment of the 300th Autonomous Surveillance Tower (AST) in support of the U.S. Customs and Border Protection (CBP), reaching a key milestone supporting Border Patrol Agents' awareness on land and maritime borders. Anduril estimates that ASTs now provide approximately 30% coverage of the U.S. southern land border.
